title: RoboSpark's PVZ Survival
description: A PVZ inspired modpack created for RoboSpark
body:
This modpack brings the fun and strategy of Plants vs. Zombies into the world of Minecraft. It includes a curated selection of mods designed to introduce new plants, hostile mobs, defensive mechanics, and an overall tower-defense-style survival experience. Players can gather resources, build fortified bases, and deploy powerful plant allies to defend against waves of undead threats.

Key features include:

A variety of plant-based weapons and defenses

Unique zombie enemies with different abilities and challenges

Progression systems that reward strategy and survival

Balanced gameplay focused on fun, not frustration

Whether you're a longtime fan of PVZ or just looking for a fresh and quirky Minecraft adventure, this pack offers a familiar but exciting twist on survival gameplay.

Prepare your defenses. The zombies are coming.
